author_mode_hint: Use the Author Mode by selecting a .json file to create one.

bulk_desc1: Enter a name to combine your
bulk_desc2: selected mods / CC into a new Modpack.

code_desc: View the snippet associated with this post.

confirm_mass_purge_archive:
Are you sure you want to PERMANENTLY DELETE the following Archive(s)?

This cannot be undone.
confirm_pin_replace: Another post is already pinned. Are you sure you want to replace it?
create_lexicon_msg: Making a Lexicon Pack creates a fun new JSON with all keys from en-sims.json! Translate them and share with the community on the Nexus.
create_mason_subtitle: Link a new verified or unverified CC Creator
creator: CC Creator
critical_action: CRITICAL ACTION REQUIRED: Fatal conflicts require resolution before deployment
defcon_active_sub: LIBRARY LOCKDOWN ENGAGED ACROSS ALL CLIENTS
defcon_confirm_execute: Are you absolutely sure you want to broadcast a GLOBAL LOCKDOWN alert? This will immediately lock down all connected clients and force emergency backups.
defcon_confirm_stand_down: Are you sure you want to stand down the global alert? This will lift the lockdown for all clients.
defcon_launch_intercept: Game update detected. Forcing emergency backup before launch. Proceed?
defcon_lonewolf_warning:
Game patch detected.

You have 'Lone Wolf' mode enabled. Are you SURE you want to launch without backing up?
defcon_override_desc: Initiate a GLOBAL LOCKDOWN. This will instantly force all connected Sanctuary OS clients to seal their libraries and trigger emergency backups. Use only during imminent game patch deployments.
defcon_prompt_confirm_danger: Are you sure you want to proceed WITHOUT a backup?
defcon_prompt_intercept_launch:
A Game Patch is Active.

Would you like to run an emergency backup before launching?
defcon_prompt_patch_detected:
A game patch has been detected.

Would you like to run an emergency backup now?
defcon_sealing_desc: A surprise game patch is imminent. Sanctuary OS is currently sealing your library and executing emergency backups to prevent mod / CC corruption. Do not close Sanctuary OS.
defcon_sealing_desc_engine:
A Surprise Game Patch Is Imminent.
Sanctuary OS is Temporarily Locked While the Engine Core is Sealed.
defcon_sealing_desc_secured:
Emergency Backups Have Been Successfully Secured.
Sanctuary OS is Now Unlocked.
defcon_sealing_desc_world:
A Surprise Game Patch Is Imminent.
Sanctuary OS is Temporarily Locked While Your World State is Sealed.
defcon_warning: Initiating a Lockdown Override will immediately flag the Global Network status as LOCKED. All connected Sanctuary OS clients will automatically seal their libraries and run emergency backups to protect their loadouts against a surprise game update.
defcon_warning_red: Do not use unless an official game patch is actively rolling out.
diagnostic_conflict_target_desc: Select a suspected conflicting mod / CC to simulate their combined injection.
diagnostic_dependencies_desc: Mods / CC required by this mod / CC.

dossier_restricted_detected: RESTRICTED MODS DETECTED IN PLAY SET
empty_desc: Everything in The Gallery is already in Your Library.
err_module_desc: The module encountered a critical error. The rest of Sanctuary OS remains operational.

god_mode_warn: This process permanently severs your profile from the global network, granting you unrestrained local sandbox authority.

import_desc2: mods / CC that are not currently in your Library. Please acquire them below.

lexicon_missing_keys_btn: All required keys must be filled before publishing.

lineage_timeline_desc: Chronological release timeline for this mod / CC
local_folder_desc: Group these mods / CC locally. This does not affect the global database.
local_only_desc: Block external uploads/downloads. Strict offline mode.
malware_alert_description: Known malware signatures have been detected on your local system. To protect your files and ensure systemic integrity, the OS requires an immediate SECURE DELETE. This action will permanently overwrite the malicious data multiple times, making it unrecoverable by specialized software.
malware_alert_external_title: WARNING: The original infected payload is still in your system!
malware_alert_subtitle: Sanctuary OS has quarantined dangerous mods / CC.
malware_severed_alert: You have chosen to override the Malware Process. Your Database Access has been severed.
malware_share_desc: Send your local quarantine manifests to the Admins for analysis and malware activity updates.
malware_share_desc2: All manifests are strickly metadata only and contain no personal or any identifying information.
malware_type_confirm: Type "I Confirm" to acknowledge the risks
malware_warning: WARNING: By bypassing the Quarantine Bay, you are willingly exposing the global network to known malicious File Hash signatures. If you proceed, your Supabase JWT will be revoked and your hardware ID will be permanently blacklisted from Sanctuary OS global databases.
market_no_assets: You have not deployed any community assets.
